project_type: TypeScript monorepo - Next.js 15 + React 19 multi-app ecosystem
build_system: pnpm workspaces + Turborepo 2. Tasks: build depends on ^build, typecheck depends on ^build, test depends on ^build.
test_framework: Vitest with @testing-library/react for UI components. Tests in __tests__/ dirs.
verification_instructions: 1. pnpm turbo typecheck 2. pnpm turbo test 3. pnpm turbo build 4. pnpm turbo lint
setup_instructions: pnpm install (lockfile exists, frozen-lockfile not needed for dev). Node 22+ required.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full npm access. Node 22, pnpm 10, TypeScript 5.5.
contribution_requirements: One app per PR preferred. All quality gates must stay green. Conventional commits.

key_patterns.api_routes: Next.js App Router route handlers in src/app/api/. Pattern: const BACKEND_URL = process.env.APP_BACKEND_URL || 'http://localhost:PORT'; then proxy with fetch passing Authorization header. See apps/quantchat/src/app/api/messages/[id]/route.ts
key_patterns.api_client_per_app: Each app has its own api-client.ts in src/services/ that calls the Next.js API routes (relative /api/*). Pattern: class with setToken(), private request() method. See apps/quantsync/src/services/api-client.ts
key_patterns.shared_api_client: packages/api-client has HttpClient class with configurable baseUrl, setAuthToken(), typed get/post/put/delete. Used via createQueryHook/createMutationHook pattern.
key_patterns.shared_ui: @quant/shared-ui exports AppShell, Sidebar, TopBar, BottomNav, CommandPaletteUI, ThemeProvider, MotionProvider, Card, Avatar, Button, Input, states (LoadingState, ErrorState, EmptyState), motion (PageTransition, FadeIn, StaggerList, SpringButton), etc.
key_patterns.brand: @quant/brand exports per-app brand configs (quantads, quantsync, etc.) with colors, generateFaviconSvg
key_patterns.app_providers: Each app has src/providers/app-providers.tsx wrapping ThemeProvider + CommandPaletteUI (Cmd+K)
key_patterns.layout: Next.js App Router layout.tsx with Inter font, metadata, QueryProvider > AppProviders > MotionProvider
key_patterns.realtime: @quant/realtime has WebSocketClient class with auto-reconnect, channel subscriptions, heartbeat, ack tracking

directory_structure: apps/ (17 Next.js apps), packages/ (95 shared packages), services/ (8 backend services like ws-gateway, matchmaking). Each app: src/app/ (App Router), src/components/, src/services/, src/hooks/, src/providers/, src/types/.
